candidates.description: Add JSON-LD Article structured data to blog posts
candidates.rationale: Blog posts lack structured data, reducing search engine visibility. JSON-LD Article schema helps Google understand post metadata (author, date, description) and can enable rich snippets in search results.
candidates.key_insight: Inject a <script type='application/ld+json'> tag with BlogPosting schema into each blog post page, using existing post metadata (title, date, spoiler, author from site.config).

candidates.description: Replace postbuild sitemap script with native Next.js app/sitemap.ts
candidates.rationale: Using Next.js built-in sitemap generation is cleaner than a postbuild script. It's type-safe, automatically included in the build, and works with static export.
candidates.key_insight: Next.js supports a sitemap() function in app/sitemap.ts that generates sitemap.xml at build time, even with output: 'export'. Replaces scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs.

candidates.description: Add robots.ts for proper robots.txt generation
candidates.rationale: No robots.txt exists currently. A proper robots.txt tells crawlers where the sitemap is and which paths to index, improving crawl efficiency.
candidates.key_insight: Next.js supports a robots() function in app/robots.ts that generates robots.txt at build time. Points crawlers to sitemap URL.
